task_description: Transform ThreatOne from a static dummy-looking app into a professional real-time cybersecurity platform. Add Timer-based live data simulation to dashboard/scanner/all pages, professional glassmorphism visuals with gradients and glows, missing SIEM/XDR/Monitor pages with real-time updates, and ensure all interactive elements work properly.

verification.summary: cmake build with ENABLE_QT=OFF succeeds. All 1618 doctest tests pass. QML changes are Qt6-only and do not affect the C++ compilation. Review issues (7) all addressed in fix commit.
